arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid won't let Endrick depart
arts.sum: Endrick looks set to remain at Real Madrid amid talk of a loan move, while Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface emerges as a Saudi Pro League target. The 24-year-old has scored an impressive 20 goals in 33 Bundesliga games for the reigning Bundesliga champions, having joined in the summer of 2023 from Union St.-Gilloise .

Real Valladolid remain bottom of La Liga, five points away from safety. Real Madrid recently climbed to the top of the table and have lost just once away from home this season. Valladolid are yet to...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid reject chance to sign Man City star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid recently rejected the opportunity to bring in Kyle Walker from Manchester City. That’s according to Marca, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: Stats reveal how many VAR decisions go against Real Madrid and Barcelona in LaLiga
arts.sum: Real Madrid are the team that has had the most goals disallowed by VAR in the Spanish top flight - far exceeding the figure for Barcelona ( 13 ) and far behind those next on the list, Atlético, Celta and Sevilla, with 17 goals disallowed respectively. Club Goals disallowed by VAR Real Madrid 32 Atletico Madrid 17 Celta 17 Sevilla 17 Villarreal 16 Real Sociedad 15 Valencia 14 Barcelona 13 Espanyol 13

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran considers Al-Nassr move as Real Madrid enter race to sign Aston Villa striker
arts.sum: The race to sign Aston Villa centre-forward Jhon Duran (21) is heating up as Real Madrid have joined PSG and Saudi Pro League Al-Nassr in the running to sign the…

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Barcelona & Real Madrid target gives verdict on January transfer
arts.sum: Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras has insisted he remains happy with the Portuguese side amid interest in his services from Manchester United, Barcelona and Real Madrid. Carreras, 21, joined Benfica this summer when his loan from United, where he was better known as Alvaro Fernandez, was made permanent for £5m, and his impressive performances have seen his transfer value grow rapidly over the past six months.
